sprint.goal: KE-9: New governance invariant design — browser governance (#1384) + irreversible action detection (#1385). Security sprint (#1449) complete.

senior.title: feat: browser governance invariants — scope, state, and pacing for browser agents
senior.note: Design phase has run 3 EM cycles with no implementation. URGENT: Begin implementation. Start with action class stub (browser.navigate, browser.click, browser.submit) in packages/core/src/actions.ts and invariant definitions in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts. Coordinate with kernel architect on design choices (action class vs shell.exec extension). File a PR this cycle.

secondary.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates for one-way operations
secondary.note: Design phase has run 3 EM cycles with no implementation. URGENT: Begin implementation. PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema already exists (packages/events/src/schema.ts). Hook into packages/kernel/src/decision.ts. File a PR this cycle.

blockers.title: [dogfood] no-governance-self-modification blocks EM squad state writes to .agentguard/squads/
blockers.note: Escalated at ageRuns=2 (2026-03-31). Now at ageRuns=3. Director has not yet resolved. Fix: narrow OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts to exclude .agentguard/squads/**. Same pattern as #1427 (persona.env exemption). Assign to senior coder.

healthReason: Sprint features #1384 and #1385 stuck in design for 3 EM cycles with no implementation. Director escalation for #1473 unresolved. 0 open kernel PRs. Tests stable 4693/4693. Codex budget auto-resolved 2026-04-03.
